title: Flink SQL Connection to ClickHouse MySQL Interface: Wrong Sequence-ID Protocol Error
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
## Issue: Flink SQL Connect to ClickHouse via MySQL Interface Error
## Scenario
```
Flink SQL connect ClickHouse MySQL interface
# Since ClickHouse doesn't have a native Flink connector, I'm trying to use ClickHouse MySQL interface as an alternative, but encountering errors.
```
## ClickHouse Config
```xml
# ClickHouse 24.10
# users.xml
<mysql4dev_user_dev01>
<profile>default</profile>
<password_double_sha1_hex>7c2b435db234f81bd736b9932080147ed96ff2bd</password_double_sha1_hex>
<quota>default</quota>
<access_management>1</access_management>
<named_collection_control>1</named_collection_control>
<show_named_collections>1</show_named_collections>
<show_named_collections_secrets>1</show_named_collections_secrets>
</mysql4dev_user_dev01>
```
## Flink SQL:
```sql
# Flink version 1.17.2
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS mysql_ck_db_dev;
CREATE TABLE mysql_ck_db_dev (
user_id INT,
message STRING,
PRIMARY KEY (user_id) NOT ENFORCED
) WITH (
'connector' = 'jdbc',
'url' = 'jdbc:mysql://192.168.2.246:19004/dev_tes',
'username' ='mysql4dev_user_dev01' ,
'password' = 'XIdbuBE0',
'table-name' = 'my_first_table'
);
SELECT * FROM mysql_ck_db_dev;
```
